rationale: The agent followed the correct workflow: read Issue #6 to understand requirements, read the relevant files (safe_local.yml, run_safe_scan.sh, validate_repo.py, etc.), correctly identified the needed changes (adding a 'features' section to the YAML and a header comment to the shell script), and attempted the writes with proper content and arguments. All three write attempts returned 403 due to the read-only PAT, which is expected sandbox behavior. The agent correctly identified this as a permissions limitation and provided the exact changes a maintainer would need. No unrelated files were modified. The task was properly executed up to the point where write access is required; the absence of write access does not constitute failure per the conventions.
